Country: Vietnam, Southeast Asia | Category: Premium Vietnam Family Explorer Package
Destinations: Hanoi • Halong Bay • Da Nang • Hoi An • Scenic Heritage Discovery

itinerary.title: Vietnam Explorer Family Tour
itinerary.overview:
Hanoi • Halong Bay • Da Nang • Hoi An • Scenic Heritage Discovery 07 Nights / 08 Days Comprehensive Vietnam Family Explorer Expedition SERIAL CODE: VN-002 TRAGUIN TOUR CODE: TRG-VNM-EXP-2026 STATE / COUNTRY: Vietnam CATEGORY: Premium Vietnam Family Explorer Package DURATION: 07 Nights / 08 Days Hanoi (2N) + Halong Bay (2N) + Da Nang/Hoi An (3N)

TOUR OVERVIEW
Discover the absolute best of Vietnam with our TRAGUIN curated family explorer expedition. From the historic northern charm of Hanoi and the emerald serenity of Halong Bay to the central coastal beauty of Da Nang and Hoi An, this comprehensive journey ensures your family creates unforgettable memories across this stunning nation. THE IMMERSIVE DAY-WISE ITINERARY
itinerary.seo_title: VN-001 | Vietnam Explorer Family Tour | TRAGUIN
itinerary.seo_description: Premium 07 Nights / 08 Days Vietnam package (VN-001 / TRG-VNM-EXP-2026): Hanoi • Halong Bay • Da Nang • Hoi An • Scenic Heritage Discovery with 4-tier handpicked accommodation.

highlights.text: Day 01: ARRIVAL IN HANOI & CULTURAL VIBE
Day 05: FLIGHT TO DA NANG & HOI AN

days.title: ARRIVAL IN HANOI & CULTURAL VIBE
days.description: Arrive in Hanoi. Private transfer to your handpicked premium hotel. Evening at leisure in the historic Old Quarter.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: HANOI HERITAGE EXPLORATION
days.description: Guided city tour of Hanoi’s most significant cultural and historical landmarks. A perfect educational introduction to Vietnam’s heritage.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: HALONG BAY CRUISE COMMENCEMENT
days.description: Transfer to Halong Bay. Board your ultra-luxury cruise vessel. Savor gourmet dining while sailing through the iconic limestone islands.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: HALONG BAY ADVENTURE
days.description: Enjoy exclusive activities aboard the cruise, including cave exploration, swimming in hidden coves, and spectacular sunset deck views—unforgettable memories.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: FLIGHT TO DA NANG & HOI AN
days.description: Morning cruise brunch. Transfer to the airport for your flight to Da Nang. Transfer to your luxury coastal resort in Hoi An.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: ANCIENT TOWN & CULTURAL MAGIC
days.description: A guided tour of Hoi An's Ancient Town, a UNESCO World Heritage site known for its charming architecture, night markets, and traditional lanterns.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: COASTAL LEISURE & CELEBRATION
days.description: A day of leisure at your coastal resort, followed by a grand farewell dinner celebrating your premium Vietnam family explorer expedition.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: DEPARTURE
days.description: Final breakfast before your TRAGUIN private transfer to the airport, completing your grand Vietnam journey.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.
